plugins.name: bb-spec-core
plugins.description: BB-Spec 核心纪律（推荐基座）：TDD 红绿重构、依赖版本策略、Git 分支与提交纪律；含 git-workflow-guard / dep-version-check / stop-self-check 三个被动 hook。| BB-Spec core discipline (recommended base): TDD, dependency version policy, Git branch & commit discipline; ships three passive hooks.

plugins.name: bb-spec-workflow
plugins.description: BB-Spec 工作流：spec → plan → exec（三 Agent 隔离）→ test-webview（网页交互验证）→ review（多代理对抗）→ revise → git-push-pr，含 init 反向 spec 化与 11 个编排 subagent。| BB-Spec workflow: spec → plan → exec → test-webview → review → revise → git-push-pr, plus init reverse-spec and 11 orchestration subagents.

plugins.name: bb-spec-product
plugins.description: BB-Spec 产品需求：/prd 与 AI 头脑风暴，质疑前置、发散收敛，产出含具体用例的自包含 PRD 文档，供工程师在 /spec 中直接消费。| BB-Spec product requirements: /prd brainstorms with AI — challenge-first, diverge then converge — and produces a self-contained PRD with concrete use cases, consumable directly by /spec.

plugins.name: bb-spec-backend
plugins.description: BB-Spec 后端技术框架约束：Go 三层架构与测试、REST API 设计与结构化错误码、关系型数据库、认证/授权、可观测性、服务运行时治理。| BB-Spec backend stack constraints: Go architecture & testing, REST API & error codes, relational DB, authN/authZ, observability, service runtime governance.

plugins.name: bb-spec-frontend
plugins.description: BB-Spec 前端技术框架约束：Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind + bun 技术栈与前端工程约定；含 block-non-bun-pm hook 强制 bun。| BB-Spec frontend stack constraints: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind + bun stack and engineering conventions; ships block-non-bun-pm hook.
